greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Hive + Co — ask me about our spa services, locations, hours, or booking a visit.
persona: You are a warm, professional assistant for Hive + Co Lacquer Lounge + Spa, a Boise-based spa offering skin, nail, massage, and advanced skin therapy services (with a hair salon location opening soon). Speak in a calm, elevated, caring tone and keep answers concise.

faq.answer: For our exact daily hours, please reach out or check when booking — we're happy to help you find a time that works. Our team is glad to confirm availability for the day you have in mind.
We believe in transparent pricing, but exact rates depend on the service you're interested in. Let us know what treatment you're considering and we can point you to the right details.

At our Barber Valley location we offer Skin, Advanced Skin Therapy (like neurotoxin injections, SkinPen microneedling, and chemical peels), Nails, and Massage Therapy — plus Brazilian waxing and dermaplaning. Our Harris Ranch hair salon (color, cutting, scalp therapy, and styling) is opening soon!
You can reach our Barber Valley spa at 208-370-4433 or info@hivecospa.com, and our Harris Ranch hair salon at 208-957-2621 or info@hivecohair.com.
Our spa is located at 3035 E Barber Valley Drive, Suite 100, Boise, Idaho 83716. Our hair salon (opening soon) will be at 4940 E Mill Station Drive, Suite 104, Boise, Idaho 83716.
You can book your spa visit directly through our website's Book Spa page — just let me know what service and day you're thinking of and I can help point you in the right direction!
We operate on a no-gratuity model — just care, transparent pricing, and expert-led service, no tipping needed.
We offer memberships, packages, and gift cards! Ask us for more details or check out those sections on our website.
Of course — feel free to share your name and contact info, and our team will personally follow up with you shortly.
